# awscc_connect_contact_flow_module_version (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::Connect::ContactFlowModuleVersion



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `contact_flow_module_id` (String) The identifier of the contact flow module (ARN) this version is tied to.
- `contact_flow_module_version_arn` (String) The identifier of the contact flow module version (ARN).
- `description` (String) The description of the version.
- `flow_module_content_sha_256` (String) Indicates the checksum value of the latest published flow module content
- `version` (Number) The version number of this revision
